rich_text.plain_text: Offering an app in Europe while processing personal data means the requirement for GDPR compliances applies whether you chose to to comply or not - this is not optional. Germany is one of the strictest GDPR enforcement environment in the EU, and the GDPR rules already apply to you today.  So the fact that you made the app available only for "certain countries"  in Europe because you were afraid that certain individuals would think you were GDPR compliant in accordance to the european regulations feels rather curious.

text.content: Offering an app in Europe while processing personal data means the requirement for GDPR compliances applies whether you chose to to comply or not - this is not optional. Germany is one of the strictest GDPR enforcement environment in the EU, and the GDPR rules already apply to you today.
